Versatile Craft Kit for Kids & Adults - Great art set for creative minds, perfect for school projects, craft kits for kids, or relaxing crafts for adults

description: Unlock endless creativity with this 2kg bundle of assorted mosaic tiles, featuring a vivid mix of glass, ceramic, and mirror pieces in various shapes and colors. Whether you're crafting mosaic kits for adults, planning an art set for children, or designing home decoration pieces, this versatile collection offers everything you need for stunning results. Ideal for DIY projects like gem art, diamond painting, custom coasters, vases, and wall art, the tiles are smooth-edged for safe handling by both beginners and experienced crafters. This set also makes an excellent addition to craft kits for kids or girl and boy gift sets. Perfect for use in classrooms, art therapy, or rainy-day hobbies at home, these mosaic tiles pair beautifully with most adhesives and can be used on wood, glass, cardboard, or ceramic surfaces. From diamond art designs to mirror tile mosaics, this bulk set supports a wide range of creative exploration. Let your next craft project shine with color, sparkle, and possibility - one tile at a time.
